workflow: Architect Consistency Check Workflow - Step 7: Remedy Planning

critical_violations.description: Missing Logs directories for Executor, Researcher, Reviewer agents
remediation_steps: Create Logs/Executor/ directory
Create Logs/Executor/Gates/ directory
Create Logs/Executor/Conversations/ directory
Create Logs/Researcher/ directory
Create Logs/Researcher/Gates/ directory
Create Logs/Researcher/Conversations/ directory
Create Logs/Reviewer/ directory
Create Logs/Reviewer/Gates/ directory
Create Logs/Reviewer/Conversations/ directory
verification_criteria: ls -la Logs/Executor/ shows Gates/ and Conversations/ subdirectories
ls -la Logs/Researcher/ shows Gates/ and Conversations/ subdirectories
ls -la Logs/Reviewer/ shows Gates/ and Conversations/ subdirectories

warning_violations.description: Non-standard workflow file naming for Planner
remediation_steps: Consider renaming Workflow/Planner/Plan.md to Workflow/Planner/Planner_Workflow.md
Update any references to the old filename in documentation or skills
verification_criteria: File renamed to standard naming convention
No broken references to old filename

warning_violations.description: Stub workflow files for Executor, Researcher, Reviewer agents
remediation_steps: Review existing workflow patterns in Architect_Consistency_Check_Workflow.md
Design comprehensive workflow steps for each agent
Implement full workflow procedures with gates
Add quality metrics and constitutional compliance sections
verification_criteria: Workflow files contain complete step-by-step procedures
Each workflow includes gate verification steps
Quality metrics defined and constitutional compliance verified

warning_violations.description: Multiple workflow-related files in Planner directory
remediation_steps: Review all files in Workflow/Planner/ directory
Determine which files are active workflow vs templates/archives
Consider creating Templates/ subdirectory for template files
Archive or remove obsolete files (Plan-old-backup.md)
verification_criteria: Clear separation between active workflow and supporting files
Directory structure reflects current workflow organization

informational_violations.description: Legacy files at Scripts root level
remediation_steps: Determine appropriate owner for check-specification-exists.ps1 (likely Planner)
Determine appropriate owner for log_conversation.py (likely Architect)
Move files to Scripts/{AgentName}/ subdirectories
Update any references to old file locations
verification_criteria: Files moved to appropriate agent-specific directories
No broken references to old file locations

informational_violations.description: Missing agent-specific script directories for Executor, Researcher, Reviewer
remediation_steps: Assess whether Executor, Researcher, Reviewer need script implementations
Create Scripts/{AgentName}/ directories only if needed
Follow Scripts structure (src/, config/, tests/) if implementing
verification_criteria: Script directories created only where needed

implementation_recommendation: Begin with Phase 1 (Critical Fixes) immediately to unblock progression. Phase 2 (Quick Wins) can be completed in the same session. Phase 3 (Major Work) should be scheduled as separate tasks for each agent workflow implementation. Phase 4 (Optional) can be deferred until agents need script implementations.
